detaileddescription.para: Decomposition of the transformation matrix xf.A into a rotation and scaling matrix.Updated automatically in the setXf() method This cache need for fast calculation of feature properties w/o expensive transformation matrix QR decomposition.
This is used for subfeatures. The index is for isSelected().

briefdescription.para: Those apply only to some features:

detaileddescription.para: Point size and line width, for primary rendering rather than subfeatures.

briefdescription.para: Point size and line width, for subfeatures rather than primary rendering.
Per-component alpha multipliers. The global alpha is multiplied by thise.
Create and generate list of bounded getters and setters for the main properties of feature object, together with prop. name for display and edit into UI.
Returns true if this class supports the property type. Otherwise passing it to the functions below is illegal.
returns mask of viewports where given property is set

detaileddescription.para:
Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

Reads parameters from json value
if you override this method, please call Base::deserializeFields_(root) in the beginning
Since a point on an abstract feature is difficult to uniquely parameterize, the projection function simultaneously returns the normal to the surface at the projection point.

briefdescription.para: forgets specific transform in given viewport (or forgets all specific transforms for {} input)
Returns point considered as base for the feature.

detaileddescription.para: The cached orthonormalized rotation matrix. isDef receives false if matrix is overridden for this specific viewport.
The cached scale and shear matrix. The main diagnoal stores the scale, and some other elements store the shearing. isDef receives false if matrix is overridden for this specific viewport.
This color is used for subfeatures. isDef receives false if matrix is overridden for this specific viewport.

briefdescription.para: Point size and line width, for primary rendering rather than subfeatures.
Point size and line width, for subfeatures rather than primary rendering.
Per-component alpha multipliers. The global alpha is multiplied by thise.
numDimensions is 0 for points, 1 for lines, 2 for surface meshes. We don't use 3 at the moment.
An interface class which allows feature objects to share setters and getters on their main properties, for convenient presentation in the UI.
